prose: Benzene frontier-orbital HOMO–LUMO gap calculated via DFT using tier standard (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitted) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. SCF converged in 8 cycles on the fixed user-supplied geometry. HOMO energy: −7.0468329 eV; LUMO energy: −0.41574728 eV. The Koopmans-style orbital gap (difference in orbital energies, not an excitation energy) is 6.6310857 eV. This is the headline value reported by the tool. All integrity checks passed.
